prestazioni: 3S-GTE (2nd Gen) engine rebuild with forged internals: JE Pistons 87mm forged slugs (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and Tomei 264°/264° camshafts with adjustable vernier pulleys for precise valve timing

Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GT2860RS-5 (0.82 A/R, 60 trim) with custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe, HKS SSQV blow-off valve, and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller (targeting 1.4 bar / 20 psi on 98 RON fuel)

Fuel system overhaul: Walbro 255 lph in-tank fuel pump, Sard 850cc/min side-feed injectors, AEM 320 lph external fuel pressure regulator, and custom 3-core aluminum radiator with Koyorad dual-core oil cooler for the 3S-GTE
estetica: Tom’s Sportivo widebody conversion kit (ST185-specific, 50mm flares) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Veilside Fortune 03
OEM+ JDM ST185 Carlos Sainz Edition rear wing (polyurethane, 3-stage adjustable) paired with custom carbon fiber side skirts and rear bumper lip by Rocket Bunny (Pandem ST185 kit)

Full interior overhaul: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (ST185-specific mounting brackets), Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel with ST185 GT-Four horn button, and custom roll cage by Cusco (8-point, bolt-in, ST185 chassis gusseted)
